reasoning: Well, initially I thought this was just a cellulitis with bruising, there was no mention of fever which is typical with necrotizing fasciitis and a time frame wasn't indicated from when antibiotics were started so it seemed reasonable to give a little bit of time for antibiotics to work to see if there was spread. With fasciitis that usually happens very quickly, so to me monitoring only really just means monitoring until situation improves or worsens. That AI highlighted the bullae was helpful in helping determine the severity of the emergency. I do feel there was some information missing here but I find AI is really good at pattern recognition and pulling out relevant information and sort of cutting through the noise to streamline thought and decision processes.
